data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution expiry window support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Attribution expiry window support' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any information or data related to this specific requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as offer creation and booking processes, without addressing the attribution expiry window. This lack of relevant evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of attribution expiry window support.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of attribution expiry window support.
